name: Mi Check Cashing
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers check cashing, payday loans, and money services at 1009 W MLK Blvd in Los Angeles. No bank account required for check cashing with valid ID.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express is a financial services retailer operating under the ACE Cash Express brand, with this location serving Los Angeles residents at 1009 W MLK Boulevard in the 90037 zip code. The company has positioned itself as a one-stop shop for consumers who need quick access to cash and money services without traditional banking relationships. This location operates Monday through Saturday (9 AM–7 PM weekdays, 9 AM–5 PM Saturday, closed Sunday), with direct phone support at (323) 733-3961.

The Los Angeles location offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including check cashing, payday loans ($100–$255 online or in-store), bill payment services, money transfers via MoneyGram, money orders, ATM access, and tax services. They also provide branded banking products including the Porte mobile banking app account, Flare Account online banking, and the ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card—all established through Pathward, N.A. (FDIC member). Personal loans are available alongside their core check-cashing and short-term lending products.

ACE distinguishes itself through in-person support combined with digital banking options, allowing customers to access both storefront and online services. The company emphasizes accessibility for unbanked and underbanked consumers by requiring only a valid government-issued ID for check cashing, with no bank account necessary. Their bundled approach to money services—combining check cashing, bill payment, and money transfers under one roof—offers convenience for customers managing multiple financial tasks.

However, the payday loan product ($100–$255 range) and associated services operate in a highly regulated space with significant borrower risks. While specific APRs and fees are not disclosed on this location page, payday loans typically carry high costs. Consumers should carefully review terms before borrowing and understand that these are short-term products designed for emergency use, not sustained financial solutions.
address: 2715 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90018

company_info.headquarters: 2715 S Western Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90018

pros: No bank account required to cash checks—only valid government-issued ID needed
Comprehensive money services under one roof: check cashing, bill payment, money transfers, money orders, ATM access, and tax services
Extended hours (9 AM–7 PM weekdays, 9 AM–5 PM Saturday) for working customers
Online payday loan application option in addition to in-store applications
FDIC-backed banking products (Porte, Flare Account) through Pathward partnership
MoneyGram money transfer service available for domestic and international transfers to 200+ countries
Mobile banking app (Porte) with in-person support available at this location
cons: Payday loans carry high APRs typical of the industry; specific rates and fees not disclosed on this page
Check cashing services likely include fees that reduce the actual amount received (standard industry practice, not specified here)
Limited to short-term, high-cost borrowing ($100–$255 payday loans) rather than sustainable financial solutions
Location-specific: service availability and terms may vary; this is one store in a larger chain
No mention of financial counseling or education to help customers avoid debt cycles
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals who need immediate access to paycheck funds without a bank account
Customers requiring same-day check cashing or bill payment services during extended retail hours
People needing occasional emergency short-term loans and money transfer services in one location
International money senders using MoneyGram who want in-person service with ID verification
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for unbanked consumers and workers without traditional bank accounts who need immediate check cashing or bill payment services. The primary caveat is that payday loans and money services, while fast and accessible, carry high costs and are designed only for short-term emergency use—not sustainable financial management.
services: Check cashing (no bank account required, valid ID only)
Bill payment services (rent, utilities, credit cards, etc.)
MoneyGram money transfers (domestic and international to 200+ countries)
ATM services (cash withdrawal, balance inquiry, card loading)
Porte mobile banking account with FDIC backing
ACE Elite Visa prepaid debit card
